title: T-056 — Cross-module contract tests (Settings ↔ Scanner ↔ Planning ↔ Production ↔ Quality ↔ Shipping) (WH §13, §16.5, §16.6)
prompt:
# T-056 — Cross-module contract tests (Settings ↔ Scanner ↔ Planning ↔ Production ↔ Quality ↔ Shipping) (WH §13, §16.5, §16.6)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §13, §16.5, §16.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Add contract tests asserting Warehouse APIs and outbox events conform to the contracts consumed by 06-SCANNER, 04-PLANNING, 08-PRODUCTION, 09-QUALITY, 11-SHIPPING. Detects breaking shape changes early.

## Implementation contract
1. Pact-style or JSON-schema contract tests under `apps/web/e2e/warehouse/contracts/`.
2. Validate: T-039 scanner inventory shape, T-040 lookup shapes, T-042 FEFO suggest shape, T-034 consume-to-WO request/response, T-010 outbox event shapes for every event consumed cross-module.
3. Assert RBAC enforcement at every cross-module boundary (e.g., 09-QUALITY qa_status writes are owner-only).
4. Assert RLS holds when cross-module reads issue queries with multi-tenant context.

## Files
- packages/contracts/warehouse/** [create]
- apps/web/e2e/contracts/warehouse-cross-module.spec.ts [create]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse/coverage.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the Scanner inventory contract is exercised, when a cross-module consumer parses the response, then it matches the published Zod schema.
2. Given the lp.consumed outbox event is emitted, when 04-PLANNING/08-PRODUCTION consumers parse it, then no schema drift is detected.
3. Given any cross-module write attempts a forbidden mutation (e.g., direct LP qa_status edit by 11-SHIPPING), then RBAC rejects.
4. Given tenant_b reads a Warehouse contract response intended for tenant_a, then RLS blocks (zero rows).

## Test strategy
- RED: failing schema-validation tests for each consumer.
- GREEN: ensure schemas/events match the Zod/JSON-schema definitions.
- Run `pnpm test --runInBand warehouse-contracts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let any consumer parse without schema validation.
- Do not skip RBAC/RLS assertions at cross-module boundaries.
- Do not version-bump shared schemas without coordinated migration.

## Dependencies
- T-021
- T-022
- T-030
- T-034
- T-035
- T-039
- T-040
- T-042
- T-047
